summary: Sprint B0 (Web Chat → CRM messaging refactor) validation. Created /app/backend/tests/test_sprint_b0_messaging.py with 14 pytest cases covering: messaging module validation (channel ∈ {web_chat, whatsapp, email, voice}, direction ∈ {inbound, outbound}, upsert returns None w/o identifiers), workspace param routing (/api/chat/greeting default→digiactiva, ?workspace=pasta-al-vuelo, unknown→404), chat captures with fuente=web_chat (no landing_chat), score_ia 0-100 & proxima_accion populated by AI, crm_messages persistence (≥4 docs per captured convo, 2 inbound + 2 outbound, channel=web_chat, ordered asc, no _id, contact backfill after capture), GET /api/crm/messages/{contact_id} requires JWT, workspace isolation (Pasta admin gets 0 msgs for DigiActiva contact; POST /api/chat/message body.workspace=pasta-al-vuelo captures in Pasta), migration effectiveness (0 landing_chat contacts remain), compound index (workspace_id, contact_id, created_at) + session_id index present, CRM Literal fuente accepts 'web_chat'. Result 14/14 PASS in 19s (~$0.003 OpenAI). Frontend Playwright: (1) landing /?workspace=pasta-al-vuelo triggers GET /api/chat/greeting?workspace=pasta-al-vuelo and renders Pasta greeting ('Asesor IA · …¿Te ayudo con tu pedido?'); (2) CRM ContactDetailModal 'Mensajes' tab (data-testid=detail-tab-mensajes) renders header '4 mensajes' + WEB_CHAT chip, and 4 aligned bubbles each with channel label + timestamp. Isolation verified end-to-end: Pasta-captured contact does NOT appear in DigiActiva contacts list.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with empty list instead of 404 when contact_id does not exist in the active workspace. Harmless for UI but callers cannot distinguish 'no messages yet' from 'not your contact'.
Still no rate limiting; each request triggers 1 chat completion + (every 2nd visitor msg) 1 extraction completion. Carried over from iteration_5/6.
Still instantiates a new AsyncIOMotorClient per request (module-level client not reused). Carried over from iteration_6.

ui_bugs.issue: When ?workspace=pasta-al-vuelo, the greeting body correctly says 'asistente de Pasta al Vuelo' BUT the header label still reads 'Asesor IA · DIGIACTIVA'. Should use workspace_name returned by /api/chat/greeting.
Contact rows have no data-testid (e.g. contact-row-<id>). Tests must click by text; brittle. Add data-testid for testability.

issues: Still reads 'FOUNDER OS' for workspace_admin (Pasta). Iteration_6 item.

action_items: (Optional/UX) ChatWidget header: replace hardcoded 'DIGIACTIVA' with workspace_name from /api/chat/greeting response.
(Optional/testability) Add data-testid='contact-row-<id>' on CRMPage contact rows.
(Consistency) Consider returning 404 from GET /api/crm/messages/{contact_id} when contact does not exist in active workspace (today returns 200 + empty list).
critical_code_review_comments: messaging.py is clean and reusable (80 LOC). Good separation of record_message vs upsert_contact_from_signal. Ready for WhatsApp reuse in Sprint B.

chat.py upserts lead_data and then backfills crm_messages contact_id via update_many — correct ordering; persisted messages after backfill ensure current pair also carries contact_id. Note: lead_data.get('score') could be str in some LLM outputs; int(...) cast would raise; current code uses 'int(lead_data.get("score") or 0)' which is safe only if non-numeric strings never appear. Minor defensive try/except could help.
server.py startup: index creation is idempotent (good) but runs inside the seed try/except — if migration raises, indexes never get created that boot. Consider splitting.
chat.py /api/crm/messages/{contact_id}: relies on {contact_id, workspace_id} match — good isolation. No pagination params for very long histories (limit default 200).
CRMPage.js continues to grow (2200+ LOC). Split ContactDetailModal / MessagesTab into their own files.

success_rate.frontend: 100% on the two new flows (ChatWidget workspace param + CRM Mensajes tab)

seed_data_creation: Tests captured live leads via real OpenAI calls (cost ~$0.003 total). Created throwaway contacts in DigiActiva (e.g. Cafe Aroma/Gym Pro) and Pasta (e.g. one pasta lead). Test-prefixed contact 'TEST_B0_Source' is deleted after fuente-literal check.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_sprint_b0_messaging.py -v. JWT key returned by /api/auth/login is 'token' (NOT 'access_token'). The test imports messaging.py directly via sys.path for unit-ish checks (validation + upsert no-ids). Index check opens its own Motor client loading /app/backend/.env. Chat POST body supports workspace slug via 'workspace' field; greeting via ?workspace= query. Sprint B0 green across 14/14 backend + Playwright UI verified. Minor carried-over items from iter_6 (FOUNDER OS label, connection-per-request) still open.
rca of the issue: No blocking issues this sprint. Two authoring hiccups fixed in-test: (1) /api/auth/login returns {token, user} not {access_token}; (2) running pytest from repo root without dotenv left MONGO_URL unreadable in the index test — fixed by loading /app/backend/.env inside the test.
